message:
feat(fp-io): add read_csv skipfooter parameter parity (frankenpandas-jy6q)

Adds CsvReadOptions.skipfooter matching pd.read_csv(skipfooter=n).
Trailing data rows are truncated after the header pass and after the
nrows limit, so combinations like nrows=4 + skipfooter=1 leave 3 rows.
skipfooter larger than the row count clears data while preserving
headers and column order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
